final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing e-commerce landing page hero section mockup for a beauty skincare brand named "LUMEA BEAUTY".

Style/medium: needs a clean, bright, airy, feminine aesthetic with floral accents — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include three-column hero layout (left: copy column, center: model subject, right: product display), header bar above, and benefit cards row below
Subject: must include all of the following:
  Center: young East Asian woman smiling, touching her cheek, holding a dropper bottle of serum
  Left column copy block: headline, subheadline, 3 pill-shaped feature badges with small icons, 3 bullet points with pink checkmarks, 2 CTA buttons, trust badge line
  Right column: 2 product items (moisturizing boost serum dropper bottle + packaging box), 3 floating white rounded-rectangle stat cards with gold accents
  Bottom: 3 horizontal white rounded-rectangle benefit cards with icons
Scene/backdrop: needs a soft, airy studio or lifestyle backdrop — exact environment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a soft, diffused feminine lighting atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must be soft pink and white as primary palette, with purple floral accents
Materials/textures: needs a soft, luminous surface treatment — exact sheen and texture weight is yours
Text (verbatim): must include all of the following text elements exactly as written:
  Header logo: "LUMEA BEAUTY"
  Navigation links (5): "特徴" / "成分" / "お客様の声" / "使い方" / "FAQ"
  Header CTA button: "今すぐ試す"
  Headline: "鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。"
  Subheadline: "乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。"
  Feature badges (3): "敏感肌OK" / "高保湿" / "朝晩使える"
  Bullet points (3): "美容成分をしっかり届ける" / "ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ" / "続けやすいシンプルケア"
  CTA buttons (2): "初回限定で試してみる >" / "成分をチェック >"
  Trust badges: "送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし"
  Stat cards (3): "満足度 96%" / "美容成分 5種配合" / "愛用者 12,000人突破"
  Benefit cards (3): "うるおい" / "透明感" / "使いやすさ"
Constraints: must preserve full three-column hero structure; all 3 feature badges must be pill-shaped; all 3 stat cards must be floating white rounded rectangles with gold accents; all 3 benefit cards must be horizontal white rounded rectangles with icons; all text elements above must appear verbatim in their designated positions
Avoid:
